seoTitle: How to Create an Account on Gumroad Easily
metaDescription: Sign up for Gumroad step by step: create your account, verify your email, and complete your profile before buying or selling.
intro: Creating a Gumroad account is the first step whether you plan to buy digital products or start selling your own, and the process is quick once you know what to expect. This guide covers signing up, verifying your email, and finishing your profile setup.

steps.heading: Open the Gumroad sign-up page
steps.body: Navigate to Gumroad's sign-up page to begin creating your account.

steps.heading: Create your account
steps.body: Enter your details to create the account, using your email or another available signup method.

steps.heading: Verify your email address
steps.body: Check your inbox for a verification email and confirm it to activate your account fully.

steps.heading: Complete profile setup
steps.body: Fill in your profile information so your account is ready to buy or start selling.

faq.question: Do I need to verify my email before using Gumroad?
faq.answer: Yes, verifying your email is a standard step to fully activate your account and access all features.

faq.question: Is signing up for Gumroad free?
faq.answer: Yes, creating an account is free — Gumroad's fees apply only when you make sales as a seller.

faq.question: What if I don't receive the verification email?
faq.answer: Check your spam folder first, and if it's still missing, look for a resend verification option on the signup page.

faq.question: Can I sign up if I only plan to buy products, not sell them?
faq.answer: Yes, the same account type works for both buying and selling — you can start as a buyer and add selling later if you choose.
